name: Timeline View
description: Season log

description: Search the log or narrow it down by type — info, warnings, and errors all keep their own trail.

name: Log Console

name: Funnel Chart

name: Leaderboard Table
description: Ranked by total yield points, with movement measured against last week's standings.

name: Sparkline Group
description: A quiet trend line beside each number so you can feel the direction before you read the percentage.

name: Gauge Meter
description: A semicircular gauge that sweeps to the current reading, so you can tell at a glance whether the plot is thirsty.

name: Radial Progress Ring
description: A ring that counts up alongside the number in its center, so progress feels like it's actually happening.

name: Stat Comparison Card
description: Every delta below is computed live from the two numbers — nothing here is hand-typed.

name: Heatmap Calendar
description: Every cell is a day in the garden — darker greens mean more minutes spent out there. Hover or tab through to see the exact count.

name: Donut Chart Legend
description: Square footage by crop family — point at a wedge or a label and the other lights up to match.

name: Breadcrumb Dropdown
description: A trail that remembers where you've walked, tucking the middle steps away until you need them.

name: Sidebar Collapse
description: This sidebar narrows to a quiet row of icons when space is tight, keeping every path one tap away.

name: Tab Overflow Menu
description: Tabs that outgrow the row don't disappear — they wait quietly behind a "more" menu until called on.

name: Pagination Numbered
description: Forty-two beds of records, one row at a time — jump ahead or step back without losing your place.

name: Infinite Scroll Loader
description: A list that keeps growing the closer you get to the bottom, like turning over one more row of soil.

name: Back To Top Button
description: A small button waits quietly out of sight, then rises into view once you've wandered far enough to need a way home.

name: Sticky Toc Nav
description: A quiet sidebar that keeps track of where you are as you move down a long article.

name: App Shell Layout
description: A plain, working shell — top bar, side nav, content pane — the sort of frame most tools end up needing.

name: Split Pane Resizable
description: Drag the middle divider (mouse, pen or touch) to resize the two panes below; the split ratio is clamped so neither side disappears.

name: Bottom Sheet Nav
description: A mobile navigation panel that slides up from the bottom, the kind of thing that stays out of the way until it's needed.

name: Context Menu
description: Right-click the plot below, or tap the small button in the corner — either path opens the same tidy set of tools.

name: Nested Dropdown Menu
description: A menu bar that opens onto deeper rows when a plot has more than one bed underneath it — click, tap, or walk the arrow keys through it.

name: Mobile Bottom Nav
description: Tap a tab below to switch panels — the same way a garden app on your phone would.

name: Anchor Scrollspy
description: These links track your place on the page as you scroll, the way a trail marker keeps you oriented in a long garden walk.

name: Hash Tab Router
description: Each tab syncs to the address bar, so a shared link opens straight to the right one, and the back button steps you through your own trail.

name: Fab Menu
description: Tap the round button in the corner and a short stack of actions unfolds beside it, ready whenever you need them.

name: Quick Actions Bar
description: Click any tile below, or use the key combo shown on it — either way the same action fires, like two paths to the same row of seedlings.

name: Keyboard Shortcuts Panel
description: Press the question mark key to unfold a small reference card of shortcuts, tucked out of the way until you need it.

name: Onboarding Tour Tooltip
description: A short guided walk through the dashboard, one calm stop at a time, with the tooltip settling beside whatever it's pointing at.

name: Feature Spotlight
description: A single element gets a moment in the light, everything else fades back, until you say you have seen it.

name: Changelog Panel
description: A quiet record of what's changed, tucked behind a bell — open it when you want to know what grew since your last visit.

name: Wizard Step Nav
description: Move forward one bed at a time — you can always step back to what's already planted, but the rows ahead stay closed until you reach them.

name: Vertical Tab Nav
description: Browse the almanac by season — arrow up and down to move between entries, or jump straight to the first or last with Home and End.

name: Mini Map Nav
description: A small strip on the right mirrors how far you've wandered down the row — click anywhere on it to jump straight there.

name: Breadcrumb With Icons
description: A small trail of icons marks the path back to where you started, so you're never quite lost in the beds.

name: Toast Stack Manager
description: Notification patch

name: Confirm Dialog
description: A place to be sure before something irreversible happens.

name: Alert Banner
description: Page-level notes that sit above the work, one per severity, until you clear them away.

name: Inline Notification
description: A small note that lives inside the page itself, not floating above it.

name: Progress Toast
description: A small corner note that tracks a task from start to finished, so you never have to wonder if it's still running.

name: Modal Stack
description: Two beds, one on top of the other — open the second only once the first has settled.

name: Drawer Form Panel
description: Add a new bed to the plot without ever leaving the page you're on.

name: Popconfirm Button
description: A small check before anything gets pulled from the bed for good.

name: Rich Tooltip
description: Hover or focus the little seed icon to learn more before you commit to planting.

name: Guided Tour Step
description: A short walk through the toolshed before you start digging in.

name: Skeleton Screen Set
description: Notes from the growing beds, updated this morning

name: Empty State Panel
description: Search the plot list — some searches turn up nothing, and that's alright too.

name: Error Boundary Panel
description: Sometimes a bed of ground doesn't take the first time — this panel shows how we catch a failure and try again.

name: Maintenance Banner
description: Scheduled maintenance begins soon — the garden gate closes briefly while we tend the roots.

name: Consent Banner Detailed
description: A quiet note about the cookies that help this garden run, and the ones you can leave out entirely.

name: Feedback Widget
description: A quick word helps us tend this better.

name: Rating Prompt Modal
description: After a while tending your plot, we like to check in and ask how the season's going.

name: Share Sheet
description: Pass this along to a fellow gardener — pick a path and it's on its way.

name: Print Preview Modal
description: Before anything leaves the greenhouse on paper, take a look at how it'll actually print.

name: Lightbox Gallery
description: A handful of snapshots from the plot — click any one to see it full size.

name: Pdf Viewer Modal
description: Open the ledger to page through it slowly, the way you'd read seed notes on a porch.

name: Video Modal
description: A short walk through the greenhouse, whenever you have a quiet minute to watch.

name: Before After Slider
description: Drag the divider to see six weeks of steady tending, before and after.

name: Command Confirm Dialog
description: This removes

name: Bulk Action Bar
description: Tend a few beds at once — select the ones ready to move, then act on all of them together.

name: Login Form
description: Enter your email and password to pick up right where you left off.

name: Signup Form
description: New here?

name: Magic Link Form
description: Skip the password — we’ll email you a one-time link that signs you in instantly.

name: Two Factor Setup
description: Account security

name: Profile Card Editable
description: Click "Edit profile" to update your name, title and bio right on the card, then save or cancel.

name: Avatar Uploader
description: Drop a photo onto the circle or use the upload button — your avatar updates instantly, right in the browser.

name: Account Settings Panel
description: Fine-tune how your account behaves — every change here takes effect immediately.

name: Billing Card
description: Your current plan and what happens if you decide to grow it.

name: Invoice List
description: Every invoice issued to your account, with a plain-text copy you can download for your own records.

name: Subscription Plan Switcher
description: Switch between monthly and yearly billing to see exactly what you'd pay either way.

name: Team Members Table
description: Manage who has access to this workspace and what they're allowed to tend.

name: Role Permission Matrix
description: Decide exactly what each role can see and touch across the workspace — toggle any cell to grant or revoke it.

name: Session List
description: These are the devices currently signed in to your account — revoke any you don't recognize.

name: Security Log
description: A running record of sign-ins and account changes, most recent first.

name: Danger Zone Panel
description: Hide your profile and pause billing. You can reactivate any time by logging back in.

name: Delete Account Confirm
description: This is the last stop before we let it go for good. Here's exactly what happens.

name: Sso Button Group
description: Pick a provider your team already trusts — we'll handle the rest.

name: Social Login Buttons
description: Create an account in a few seconds using an account you already have.

name: Email Verify Banner
description: Your plots, harvests, and reports live here once your account is fully set up.

name: Referral Panel
description: Every friend who signs up with your link plants a free month onto both your accounts.

name: Usage Quota Bar
description: Usage resets on the 1st of every month; drag the slider below to see how the meter reacts as you approach your limit.

name: Api Usage Chart
description: Tap or hover a bar to see the exact call count logged that day.

name: Webhook List
description: Endpoints that get notified the moment something changes in your account.

name: Notification Preferences
description: Choose exactly how each type of update reaches you — nothing arrives on a channel you haven't checked.

name: Product Filter Sidebar
description: Filter by category and price to find the plants that suit your plot, then clear the bed whenever you want a fresh start.

name: Cart Summary Panel
description: Adjust quantities or set something back on the shelf — the total keeps pace with every change.

name: Checkout Progress Bar
description: Each stage settles into place as you finish it, so you always know how much ground is left to cover.

name: Wishlist Toggle Button
description: Tap the heart to save a favorite — it remembers your picks even after you close the tab.

name: Shipping Options
description: Every option leaves from the same greenhouse — pick the pace that fits your planting schedule.

name: Review Stars Input
description: A quick note from you helps the next gardener pick the right seed.

name: Review List Panel
description: Five honest notes from people who planted before you did.

name: Bundle Upsell Card
description: Grab the tools growers usually pick up alongside this one, and save a little on each.

name: Bundle Selector
description: Buy more seed packets at once and the per-packet price drops — pick what fits your plot.

name: Countdown Sale Banner
description: A short-run discount on tools and seed while the current batch lasts.

name: Newsletter Signup Box
description: A short monthly note on what's coming into season — no noise, unsubscribe whenever.

name: Customer Story Carousel
description: A few honest words from the people tending their own plots with our tools.

name: Feature Comparison Grid
description: A quick side-by-side of what each plan actually includes, feature by feature.

name: Faq Accordion
description: A short, honest answer to the questions we hear most often — search to jump straight to yours.

name: Promo Banner
description: This strip sits above the rest of the page and remembers your choice — dismiss it once and it stays closed until local storage is cleared.

name: Sale Tag Badge
description: A short run of overstock pieces, marked down while stock lasts.

name: Cart Quantity Stepper
description: Adjust how many you'd like — we'll only ever sell what's actually on the shelf.

name: Gift Wrap Toggle
description: Sending this along to someone else? We'll wrap it gently in kraft paper and twine.

name: Currency Switcher
description: Prices update instantly wherever you're shopping from — pick a currency below.

name: Size Guide Modal
description: Cut generously for layering — check your measurements before you order.

name: Product Variant Picker
description: Pick a color and size — we'll let you know right away if that pairing isn't in stock.

name: Recently Viewed Products
description: A quiet record of what you've been browsing, in case you want to circle back.

name: Stock Alert Form
description: Leave your email and we'll let you know the moment it's back in the ground.

name: Order Tracker
description: We track every parcel from the moment it leaves our shelves to the moment it reaches your door.

name: Return Request Form
description: Tell us which order and why, and we'll get a return label headed your way.

name: Json Tree Viewer
description: Paste any JSON below and watch it take root as a browsable, collapsible tree.

name: Diff Highlighter
description: Set two rows side by side and see exactly what changed between plantings.

name: Color Palette Generator
description: Pick one seed color and let it bloom into tints, shades, and a complement.

name: Unit Converter
description: Measure a row or a field — this converts length between the units you actually reach for.

name: Qr Code Display
description: Type anything and watch a fresh code sprout from it, ready to scan into the field.

name: Copy To Clipboard Badge
description: Grab the install line without reaching for the mouse twice — one click and it's in your clipboard.

name: Keyboard Key Display
description: Press anything — the keys land here exactly as your browser reports them.

name: Shortcut Hint Badge
description: Every action here answers to two masters — a click, or the shortcut printed right on the button.

name: Density Switcher
description: Same rows, different breathing room — pick the density that suits how much you're tending at once.

name: Layout Grid Toggle
description: Browse the same plots two ways — spread wide in a grid, or stacked for a quick scan.

name: Breakpoint Indicator
description: A quiet marker in the corner that tells you which patch of the responsive field you're standing in.

name: Debug Panel
description: A small instrument cluster that watches the page the way you might watch weather — cursor, viewport, and scroll, tracked in real time.

name: Feature Flag List
description: Every flag is a seed you've planted early — some ready to open to everyone, some still best kept to a small bed.

name: Api Response Viewer
description: A patch of soil for testing calls before they go anywhere near real ground — send a request, watch what comes back.

name: Webhook Tester Form
description: Test a webhook the way you'd test soil before planting — send something small, see what comes back, keep a record of every attempt.

name: Rate Limit Indicator
description: Every call draws from the same shared bed — watch the count before it runs dry.

name: Cron Builder
description: Set the schedule field by field — the expression below updates as you go, no guesswork required.

name: Timezone Picker
description: Every plot keeps its own clock — find the one you're working with and watch it tick in real time.

name: Markdown Editor Lite
description: A small patch of markdown, tended live — type on the left and watch it take shape on the right.

name: Code Diff Inline
description: A quiet record of what changed in the irrigation helper — nothing dramatic, just tighter roots.

name: Env Var Editor
description: Tend your environment variables one row at a time, then copy the whole bed out as a plain .env file.

name: Regex Tester
description: Plant a pattern, see which parts of the text take root.

name: Base64 Converter
description: Convert text to Base64 and back, right where you're standing, no round trip to a server.

name: Hash Generator Display
description: Every input settles into exactly one fingerprint — type below and watch it form.

name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
description: Fill your layout with placeholder text grown fresh, not the same stale paragraph everyone copies.

name: Comment Thread
description: A quiet thread for the conversation that keeps growing.

name: Chat Bubble List
description: Tap any message to see exactly when it was planted.

name: Chat Input Bar
description: Small notes for the plot crew, sent as they sprout.

name: Notification Center Panel
description: Everything that's sprouted since you last checked in.

name: Mention Suggestion List
description: Type @ to bring a collaborator into the bed with you.

name: Reaction Bar
description: A small patch of feeling, left under something someone tended.

name: Poll Widget
description: One quiet vote, added to a bed of others — change your mind any time before the season ends.

name: Quote Block Card
description: A few words, kept and passed along by the people who said them.

name: Blog Post Card Grid
description: Notes from the field, sorted so you can find the row you're standing in.

name: Author Bio Card
description: Follow along and their next notes will find their way to you.

name: Related Articles Card
description: A few more threads worth pulling on while you're here.

name: Social Share Card
description: Pass this one along — good ideas spread best when shared.

name: Bookmark Button Card
description: One steady root can hold up a whole season of growth.

name: Tag Filter List
description: Narrow the bed down to what you're actually looking for.

name: Search Results List
description: Type a few letters and watch the right entry surface on its own.

name: Announcement Bar
description: A small notice that clears away once it's been seen, so the space stays tidy.

name: Status Uptime Widget
description: A quiet daily record of how steadily each service has been growing.

name: Event Card
description: A small plot marked on the calendar, waiting for company.

name: Speaker Card
description: A short introduction — press for the fuller story behind the talk.

name: Job Listing Card
description: One opening, tended and ready for the right person to take root.

name: Recipe Card
description: Something worth letting simmer a while.

name: Weather Forecast Card
description: Partly cloudy, light breeze from the west

name: Stock Ticker Card

description: Rootstock volatility, tracked live from the grove.

description: A short pruning of today's headlines, ready in one sitting.
